temporal_description: The audio is filled with a tense and suspenseful musical score. A low, ominous, and atmospheric synthesizer drone creates a feeling of unease and anticipation. The video opens with a medium shot of a man in a dark suit and a striped tie walking purposefully through a dimly lit, green-hued hallway. He has a serious expression. Behind him, two other men are partially visible, also in dark clothing. The camera is shaky, following the lead man as he moves forward. On the left side of the screen, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are superimposed over the scene. The camera pans quickly to the right, creating a motion blur effect that transitions the scene. The background is a blur of the green-lit hallway and framed pictures on the wall. The white Chinese text remains visible. The camera settles on a group of five men standing together in the same green-lit, tiled hallway. They all have stern, intense expressions and are looking forward. From left to right, the men are: one in a black long-sleeved shirt, one in a black suit jacket, one with a beard in a dark shirt, an older man in a light-colored suit jacket, and another man in a black shirt on the far right. Behind them, a barred or grated window is visible. The white Chinese text, "风行网," is still present on the left side of the frame. The camera is stationary, holding a medium shot of the group. The music is slow and deliberate, building a sense of gravity and impending confrontation, perfectly complementing a serious or dramatic moment. There is no dialogue or other sound effects, allowing the foreboding music to dominate the soundscape.
